name: Corn Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt).
2. Mix together the corn and egg.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the corn mixture, stirring slowly.
4. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Drop the batter by tablespoonfuls into the hot oil, adding only one layer at a time.
6. Fry for about 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
7. Drain on absorbent paper and dust with powdered sugar if desired.
8. Makes 16 fritters.
